newsletter.label: Email Newsletter Subscribe
newsletter.description: Subscribe to the What Ci email newsletter for events and other news.

calendar.label: Google Calendar
calendar.note: Subscribe with the "Add to Google Calendar" link on the calendar page.

calendar-subscribe.label: Google Calendar Subscribe (with Google Account)
calendar-subscribe.description: Subscribe with your Google Account (requires login).

ical.label: Calendar Subscribe (without Google)
ical.description: Copy and paste the link into your calendar app as a new subscription. Or download the ics file for a one time snapshot of events.
